title: ModernCraft
description: A modpack that adds modern, cool stuff. Like guns...
body:
ModernCraft is a Minecraft modpack that transforms your blocky world into a high-tech civilization! Dive into a gameplay experience that blends the classic charm of Minecraft with the innovations of modern technology and industry. Whether you’re automating production, building sleek cities, or mastering cutting-edge machinery, ModernCraft provides the tools and challenges to bring your futuristic dreams to life.

Features:
Advanced Machinery: Harness powerful tech mods to automate resource gathering and manufacturing.
Modern Architecture: Build sleek skyscrapers, urban landscapes, and smart homes using modern building blocks and decorative items.
Energy Systems: Master complex power grids with sustainable energy sources like solar panels, wind turbines, and nuclear reactors.
Transportation: Travel in style with cars, planes, and high-speed rail systems to connect your world.
Automation and Industry: Set up automated factories and assembly lines to streamline crafting and production.
With ModernCraft, reshape your Minecraft world into a thriving metropolis and experience the future of creativity, technology, and adventure!

Anyway, here's a link to a map that i found fits really well with this modpack! Please try it out:
